title: SOA-Harness v1.0 Session Bootstrap Response
description: Normative schema for the 201 Created response body of POST /sessions (Core §12.6). The endpoint creates a new session and returns the session bearer that authorizes subsequent calls to /stream, /permissions/resolve, and /audit/tail.

session_id.description: Newly minted session identifier matching the §12.1 session-file schema pattern. MUST NOT be re-derivable from the bootstrap bearer.

session_bearer.description: Opaque bearer token authorizing /stream, /permissions/resolve, and /audit/tail for exactly this session_id. Scopes: stream:read:<session_id>, permissions:resolve:<session_id>, audit:read. Does NOT carry sessions:create.

granted_activeMode.description: The session's bound capability. MUST equal requested_activeMode when within bounds; MUST be ≤ the Agent Card's permissions.activeMode.

expires_at.description: RFC 3339 timestamp when this session bearer (and the session itself) expires. Equal to created_at + min(requested_ttl, deployment_maximum_ttl).

runner_version.description: Matches the soaHarnessVersion value in Agent Card. Carried for drift attribution.
